hypothesis: If a single-agent pipeline combining structured text extraction (via marker-pdf SDK) with multimodal image processing and a powerful language model backbone is applied to automated chemical information extraction, then it will achieve competitive or superior precision, recall, and F1 scores compared to more complex multi-agent domain-specific systems, because streamlined end-to-end document processing with standardized prompting reduces error propagation across agent handoffs while retaining sufficient domain coverage through the language model's parametric knowledge.
